debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (quickSort α inst✝ l)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
induction l with
  | nil =>
    simp [quickSort]
  | cons pivot l ih =>
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (l := smaller pivot l) (x := x)
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (l := larger pivot l) (x := x)
    simpa [quickSort, count_sum_above_below_pivot, ih₁, ih₂, List.count_append, List.count_cons, Nat.add_assoc,
      Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
